selection_reason: PSF FWHM=80 mas in the NIRSpec slit plane at 2.5 um; diffraction-limited (Strehl>0.8) above 2.46 um; sets psf.py's diffraction-limited FWHM(lambda) calibration anchor and DIFFRACTION_LIMIT_ONSET_UM

selection_reason: JWST primary mirror: 18 segments covering 6.5 m at its widest point (quoted verbatim from NASA page via WebFetch, 2026-07-15). Used in psf.py's lambda/D diffraction-limited scaling law; cross-checked to <1% against the Jakobsen et al. 2022 80 mas @ 2.5 um anchor. (JDox jwst-docs.stsci.edu/jwst-observatory-hardware/jwst-telescope was also attempted but returns only a client-rendered SPA navigation shell to WebFetch, no extractable body text -- NASA science.nasa.gov page used instead as the verified primary source.)

MOS-mode target acquisition (MSATA) required accuracy <25 mas, typically achieves ~20 mas; blind guide-star pointing (no MSATA) ~100 mas 1-sigma/axis. Sets monte_carlo.centering_sigma_mas fiducial default (20 mas) and the 0-100 mas offset sweep range used in figures.
licence_or_terms: arXiv open access (CC BY 4.0) / A&A open access
